description: Program-memory v3 belief updates distilled from adjudicated claims.

required_fields.name: belief_domain
required_fields.description: Belief domain such as target, mechanism, or design.

required_fields.name: extraction_confidence
required_fields.description: Confidence in the fidelity of the underlying extracted evidence.

required_fields.name: source_reliability
required_fields.description: Reliability of the sources supporting the belief update.

required_fields.name: risk_of_bias
required_fields.description: Bias risk in the supporting evidence.

required_fields.name: reporting_integrity_risk
required_fields.description: Risk that source discrepancies or reporting artifacts distort the update.

required_fields.name: transportability_confidence
required_fields.description: Confidence that the update transports beyond the exact studied context.

required_fields.name: interpretation_confidence
required_fields.description: Confidence in the distilled interpretation represented by the update.

required_fields.name: confidence_label
required_fields.description: Confidence label for the belief update.

optional_fields.name: target_id
optional_fields.description: Target identifier when the belief update is target-scoped.

optional_fields.name: mechanism_id
optional_fields.description: Mechanism identifier when the belief update is mechanism-scoped.

optional_fields.name: affected_population
optional_fields.description: Population slice most affected by the update.

optional_fields.name: supporting_claim_ids
optional_fields.description: Delimited list of supporting claim identifiers.
